Replace ADX trend filter with RSI(14) overbought confirmation on entries; only buy when EMA crosses up AND RSI < 70 to avoid peak entries while staying less restrictive than prior RSI experiment.
Add ATR-based trailing stop loss on exits while keeping ADX-filtered EMA entries; lock in gains dynamically without whipsaws from tight fixed stops.
